completed_features.description: User can create a new note with a title and markdown body
completed_features.notes: New Note button in header creates note via server action and redirects to /notes/[id] editor

completed_features.description: User can see a live preview of markdown as they type
completed_features.notes: Split-pane editor with Preview toggle button. Uses react-markdown + remark-gfm for rendering. Preview pane shows side-by-side on desktop, replaces editor on mobile.

completed_features.description: User can search across all notes by title and content
completed_features.notes: Search input in notes list header filters notes by title and body content using SQL LIKE queries

completed_features.description: User can pin important notes to the top of the list
completed_features.notes: Pin toggle in editor toolbar and hover action in notes list. Pinned notes sort to top with pin icon indicator.

completed_features.description: User can see word count and reading time for each note
completed_features.notes: Footer bar in editor shows word count and estimated reading time (200 wpm). Word count stored in DB and shown in note list items.

completed_features.description: User can delete notes and recover from trash within 30 days
completed_features.notes: Soft-delete moves to trash (sets trashedAt). Trash view shows days remaining. Restore and permanent delete (with confirmation dialog) available.

completed_features.description: User can favorite notes and filter to favorites
completed_features.notes: Favorite toggle in editor and notes list. Favorites sidebar link filters to favorited notes only.

completed_features.description: User can sort notes by date modified, date created, or title
completed_features.notes: Sort dropdown in notes list header with three options. Default is date modified.

done_conditions.description: User can create a new note with a title and markdown body
done_conditions.notes: New Note button creates note via server action, redirects to editor. Title field and markdown body textarea available.

done_conditions.description: User can edit an existing note and see changes auto-saved
done_conditions.notes: 1-second debounced auto-save on title and body changes. Cmd+S forces immediate save. Save status shown in toolbar.

done_conditions.description: Markdown preview renders headings, bold, italic, code blocks, links, lists, and images correctly
done_conditions.notes: react-markdown with remark-gfm plugin. @tailwindcss/typography prose classes for styled rendering. Supports GFM tables, strikethrough, task lists.

done_conditions.description: User can delete a note (soft-delete) and see it appear in the Trash view
done_conditions.notes: Delete button in editor toolbar and hover action in list. Sets trashedAt timestamp. Note appears in /notes/trash.

done_conditions.description: User can restore a note from Trash
done_conditions.notes: Restore button in trash list clears trashedAt and moves note back to active list.

done_conditions.description: User can permanently delete a note from Trash
done_conditions.notes: Delete button in trash list with AlertDialog confirmation. Permanently removes note from database.

done_conditions.description: User can pin a note and it appears at the top of the notes list
done_conditions.notes: Pin toggle via button in editor toolbar or hover action in list. Pinned notes ordered first via ORDER BY is_pinned DESC.

done_conditions.description: User can favorite a note and filter to show only favorites
done_conditions.notes: Favorite toggle in editor and list. Favorites sidebar link navigates to /notes?filter=favorites which filters query.

done_conditions.description: User can search notes by title or content and see matching results
done_conditions.notes: Search input in notes list with real-time filtering. SQL LIKE query on title and body fields.

done_conditions.description: User can sort notes by date modified, date created, or title
done_conditions.notes: DropdownMenu sort selector with three options. Updates URL query parameter, server re-renders.

done_conditions.description: Word count and reading time are displayed for the current note
done_conditions.notes: Footer bar shows live word count and reading time estimate (200 wpm). Word count computed client-side and persisted to DB on save.

routes_or_screens.description: Landing/marketing page with hero section and CTA buttons
Sign-in form with branding logo, spinner on submit, disabled state
Sign-up form with branding logo, password hint, spinner on submit
Notes list with search bar, sort dropdown, new note button. Shows pinned/favorited indicators. Hover actions for pin/favorite/delete.
Filtered view showing only favorited notes
Note editor with title field, markdown textarea, live preview toggle, pin/favorite/delete toolbar, word count footer, auto-save
Trash view listing soft-deleted notes with restore and permanent delete actions
Settings page with account info, theme toggle, sign out

how_to_run.web: cd web && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && npm run db:migrate && npm run dev

known_issues: Sessions are stored in-memory (Map) — they won't persist across server restarts. Acceptable for local dev with SQLite.
Node.js >= 20.9.0 is required (Next.js 16 requirement). Use 'nvm use 22' if available.
Search is debounced client-side but uses URL params, causing a page refresh for each search update.
self_eval_notes: Build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors. All 11 done conditions for Sprint 2 implemented. Notes CRUD flow works end-to-end: create, edit with auto-save, pin, favorite, search, sort, soft-delete, restore, permanent delete. Markdown preview renders all common elements via react-markdown + remark-gfm with @tailwindcss/typography styling. Sprint 1 eval issues all addressed.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.issue: Theme preference does not persist to database — only localStorage
previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Added ThemeSyncer client component in notes layout that reads user.theme from the DB (fetched server-side) and calls setTheme() on mount, ensuring cross-device theme sync.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.issue: Empty state shows developer-facing Sprint 2 text
previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Replaced entire notes page with functional NotesList component. Empty state now shows contextual messages: 'No notes yet', 'No matching notes', or 'No favorites yet' depending on context.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.issue: Sign-up form uses only browser-native validation, no inline error display
previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Added password hint text below field. Server-side Zod errors still surface via useActionState error banner. Inputs now disabled during submission.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.issue: Auth forms have no loading spinner or disabled state during submission
previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Added Spinner SVG component shown during isPending state. Submit buttons now disabled during form submission to prevent double-submit.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.issue: Auth pages have no branding or logo
previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Added Logo component with MarkdownNotes icon and 'Back to home' link above the auth card on both sign-in and sign-up pages.

previous_eval_issues_addressed.issue: Mobile: no quick access to settings without opening hamburger menu
previous_eval_issues_addressed.fix: Acknowledged — sidebar navigation pattern retained as-is since it's consistent with the app's responsive design. Settings remain accessible via hamburger menu on mobile.
